instructions: Use `npm create astro@latest -- --template starlight` to scaffold a new Starlight project
Use `npx astro add starlight` to add Starlight to an existing Astro project
All Starlight options live inside `starlight({})` in `astro.config.mjs`
Content pages must be placed under `src/content/docs/`
File paths under `src/content/docs/` map 1:1 to URL routes
Sidebar `slug` values must not have leading slashes or file extensions
Use `items` for explicit sidebar entries and `autogenerate` for directory-based entries
Never mix `items` and `autogenerate` in the same sidebar group
Set `site` URL at `defineConfig` level (not inside `starlight({})`) for sitemap generation
Use `replacesTitle: true` on `logo` when the logo image already includes the site name
Use `logo.light` and `logo.dark` for separate light/dark logo variants (mutually exclusive with `logo.src`)
Use `draft: true` in frontmatter to exclude pages from production builds
Use `template: splash` for full-width landing pages without sidebars
Run `npx @astrojs/upgrade` to keep Starlight up to date
